## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes are documented.
- [ ] Behavior changes include tests.
- [ ] Backend-specific changes cover both `babel` and `oxc` behavior when applicable.
- [ ] Comments and documentation are written in English.
